title: EGFR Lung Cancer Study
inclusion_criteria: Adults 40-75 with stage III lung cancer and EGFR+ biomarker
exclusion_criteria: Prior EGFR inhibitor failure or severe renal impairment

title: PD-L1 Advanced Lung Trial
inclusion_criteria: Adults 45-80 stage IV lung cancer with PD-L1 positive report
exclusion_criteria: Active autoimmune disease or uncontrolled infection

title: Targeted Breast HER2 Trial
inclusion_criteria: Female adults 30-65 with stage II breast cancer and HER2 positivity
exclusion_criteria: Pregnancy or previous HER2 targeted toxicity grade 4

title: Hormone Positive Breast Study
inclusion_criteria: Adults 35-70 stage III breast cancer ER positive profile
exclusion_criteria: Severe cardiac dysfunction or metastatic brain lesions

title: Immunotherapy for NSCLC
inclusion_criteria: Adults 50-78 with stage II NSCLC and PD-L1 positive marker
exclusion_criteria: Current immunosuppressive therapy or transplant history

title: Precision Ovarian Trial
inclusion_criteria: Women 25-60 with stage III ovarian cancer and BRCA mutation evidence
exclusion_criteria: Prior PARP resistance or uncontrolled bleeding disorder

title: Colorectal KRAS Inhibitor
inclusion_criteria: Adults 35-72 stage IV colorectal cancer with KRAS mutation

title: Leukemia FLT3 Response Trial
inclusion_criteria: Adults 18-55 with stage II leukemia and FLT3 positive genomic panel
exclusion_criteria: Active CNS leukemia or severe hepatic impairment

title: Lymphoma B-Cell Therapy
inclusion_criteria: Adults 22-68 with stage III lymphoma and CD20 biomarker positivity

title: Gastric Cancer Biomarker Study
inclusion_criteria: Adults 40-70 with stage II gastric cancer and HER2 positivity

title: Advanced Melanoma Immuno Trial
inclusion_criteria: Adults 21-67 stage IV melanoma with BRAF mutation confirmed

title: Early Lung Stage EGFR Trial
inclusion_criteria: Adults 30-68 with stage I lung cancer and EGFR positive profile
exclusion_criteria: Interstitial lung disease or oxygen dependency

title: Breast Triple Positive Study
inclusion_criteria: Adults 28-62 with stage II breast cancer and HER2 positive markers
exclusion_criteria: Active hepatitis B or C with high viral load

title: Head and Neck Precision Trial
inclusion_criteria: Adults 33-74 stage III head and neck cancer PD-L1 positive

title: Pancreatic KRAS Combination Study
inclusion_criteria: Adults 42-76 stage IV pancreatic cancer with KRAS mutation
